anti_claim: Evidence-class rows and truth-accounting buckets are read-model classification metadata only; they do not create score-based progress, maturity, readiness, release, source-mutation, proof-correctness, whole-system correctness, provider-call, private-equivalence, secret-export, or product-completeness authority.
authority_boundary: Curated public evidence-strength registry consumed by the Microcosm runtime authority and spine projections. It classifies what each organ proves; it does not authorize release, provider calls, secret export, source mutation, score-based progress, maturity, readiness, proof correctness, private-data equivalence, product completeness, or whole-system correctness.

overread_guard: counts_as_real_substrate_progress separates evidence buckets inside this public prototype; it is not a product-progress score
evidence_strength_rank is an ordinal disclosure aid, not a benchmark, maturity level, or release gate
accepted_current_authority names current public receipts only; it is not source authority above macro contracts
authority_ceiling.reader_action: Use class_profiles and organ_evidence_classes to understand bounded evidence strength and truth-accounting buckets; do not treat counts, ranks, accepted status, or class names as score, maturity, readiness, release, product-completeness, private-equivalence, or whole-system authority.

Classified bounded_runtime_computation because each case actually executes the capsule's real runtime: it stands up a temp SQLite store, runs DDL/inserts/updates, performs lease math against the process clock, projects claim events, and runs the reconciler over the resulting rows. This is genuine bounded computation over a synthetic store, not a fixture echo (output is not pre-baked in the fixture), not a schema replay (it mutates and reads real SQLite state), and not an external subprocess/semantic-validator (no external binary, no NL judgement). Negatives are rejected by recomputation: the reconciler derives the firing rule from observed job/run/log state, and substituting a wrong expected marker flips the organ to fail.

evidence_class=bounded_runtime_computation because the organ runs the real capsule computation end-to-end over authored fixtures with a deterministic, bounded workload: JSON-pointer resolution, glob enumeration, and a small git index built inside an isolated tempdir. It is not a mere fixture_echo (it recomputes values and compares observed vs expected, and falsifiability is demonstrated), not a schema_replay (it executes the provider logic, not just shape-checks), not an algorithmic_projection (no model/extrapolation), not an external_subprocess_witness in the gating sense (the git subprocess is an internal callable-fact detail over a throwaway tempdir, not the central claimed mechanism and not an absent dependency), and not a semantic_validator (it explicitly does NOT judge truth of claims). family_id=research_and_science_replays fits a registry/provider data-resolution runtime that replays authored fact-resolution cases with planted-defect rejection; it is closer to a research/replay data-evaluation organ than to entry, navigation, formal proof, agent-safety, import-projection, or work-landing families.

Classified as bounded_runtime_computation: the organ runs the real capsule's deterministic, stdlib-only benchmark recomputation (set-based recall/precision, substring forbidden-route check, scent-term coverage, integer latency-budget comparison, percentile summary) over small bounded fixture inputs at call time. It is not a mere fixture echo/replay (the verdict is computed, not stored), not an algorithmic projection (it executes the actual scoring code path on the inputs), and needs no external subprocess, prover, or network — so external_subprocess_witness / semantic_validator do not apply. Negatives are decided by recomputation contradicting a planted expectation, confirmed by two falsifiability probes.

evidence_class=bounded_runtime_computation because _evaluate_case invokes the real capsule function route_catalog (which transitively runs route_annexes) over each fixture and compares the live-computed status/slug/score/note-ids to fixture expectations — it is genuine deterministic computation over bounded inputs, not a fixture echo (the answers are recomputed, not read from the fixture) and not an external subprocess (pure in-process stdlib). family_id=architecture_and_navigation because the mechanism is a routing/navigation surface: it maps a problem statement onto ranked entries of a knowledge catalog (annex discovery/navigation), which is the architecture-and-navigation concern rather than math/proof, agent-reliability, or science-replay. gate_runnable=true: no absent dependency; build_result returns status=pass with 4 cases under PYTHONPATH=src python3.

Classified bounded_runtime_computation because each case executes the capsule's real phrase-membership detection at runtime: it recomputes the three detector verdicts (permission-gate-without-blocker, self-error-without-capture, command-displacement-to-operator) over the agent-output text by testing tripwire-phrase presence against legitimiser-phrase absence, and compares the observed green/red verdict plus the firing diagnostic id to the case expectation. It is not a fixture echo or schema replay (the verdict is recomputed, proven by repair/break flips), not an external subprocess, and explicitly not semantic understanding; it is bounded deterministic computation over public fixtures. Negatives are rejected by recomputation: a planted policy-violating text fires its tripwire without a legitimiser and the gate flags it red with the expected diagnostic id.

evidence_class=external_subprocess_witness because the surfaced mechanism's drift verdict is a check-command return-code witness (the capsule's no-write check command, run through its command runner — the same path that would invoke subprocess.run for an external owner command), not a pure in-module computation. The two positives and two negatives each route through the capsule's real check pipeline; negatives are rejected by recomputation (planted byte -> check_command_failed via builtin:assert-file-equals; missing artifact -> artifact_missing presence check), and the cache-hit positive is proven to skip the command via the real source-hash cache (check_mode=source_hash_cache_hit, hit_count=1). gate_runnable=true because every fixture stays on the in-process builtin command surface, so no absent external binary is needed.

evidence_class=external_subprocess_witness because the surfaced mechanism's verdict is produced by the installed Lean subprocess: run_and_or_search and run_statement_only_hammer call check_candidate_with_lean which shells out to `lean` to compile each candidate tactic body, a #print axioms cleanliness gate rejects sorry-tainted candidates, and a forward oracle firewall plus a problem-id ablation reject leaked oracle bodies and policies that only work because they memorised the problem id. The positive fixture is accepted only when real Lean closes the toy theorems; the four negatives are rejected by recomputation (two oracle-firewall violations, one axiom taint, one problem-id ablation failure). It is a gated external-tool witness: when the lean binary is absent the organ returns a terminal locked state and verifies nothing rather than counting tool-absence as a mechanism failure or faking a pass.
